data_description.breaker_type: Select your main circuit breaker rating. This limits the maximum import power that can be configured (16 A → 11 kVA, 20 A → 13.8 kVA, 32 A → 22 kVA).
data_description.expert_mode: Enables advanced controls: working mode selector, export limit, and import limit. These write directly to the inverter over Modbus — use with caution.
